MINI MINUTES:

Oren P. Noah, Esq. of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiffs / opposing parties Michael Shropshire, et al.

RULING:
Defendant O'Connor Lumber Co.'s motion for summary judgment
No other appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant O'Connor Lumber Company's motion for summary judgment is denied. The only 'facts' set forth in defendant's separate statement regarding the purported absence of asbestos in the FixAll that Mr. Shropshire assertedly purchased from defendant are based on inadmissible interrogatory responses and thus defendant proffers no facts supported by admissible evidence on this issue. Plaintiffs' objections to defendant's use of Dowman's GO 129 interrogatory responses are sustained. Prevailing party is to prepare an order.
